text: Starlink connecting schools on remote islands! https://t.co/tLIZ1WCdOL
summary: Starlink connecting schools on remote islands!
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced Starlink's expansion into remote island connectivity, demonstrating the satellite internet service's growing market application beyond traditional broadband markets. This highlights Starlink's business strategy of pursuing underserved geographies with high barriers to traditional infrastructure, a key lever for scaling the company's subscriber base and revenue while advancing its mission of global internet coverage.

text: @JonErlichman I think SpaceX might be able to reach approximately $1T revenue in 2030
summary: @JonErlichman I think SpaceX might be able to reach approximately $1T revenue in 2030

parent.text: SpaceX's projected revenue: 2040: $3.4 trillion (estimate) 2030: $330 billion (estimate) 2028: $160 billion (estimate) 2025: $18.7 billion (actual) Source: Morgan Stanley estimates
parent.name: Jon Erlichman
parent.embed_html:
SpaceX's projected revenue:

2040: $3.4 trillion (estimate)

2030: $330 billion (estimate)

2028: $160 billion (estimate)

2025: $18.7 billion (actual)

Source: Morgan Stanley estimates

— Jon Erlichman (@JonErlichman) June 14, 2026

ai_summary: Jon Erlichman shared Morgan Stanley's revenue projections for SpaceX across multiple years, with 2025 actual revenue at $18.7B and estimates reaching $3.4T by 2040. Elon Musk corrected the timeline, stating SpaceX could reach approximately $1T revenue by 2030 instead of 2040, suggesting significantly accelerated growth expectations. This exchange reveals SpaceX's aggressive scaling trajectory and Musk's confidence in the company's ability to capture massive market opportunity in space commercialization ahead of analyst consensus timelines.
embed_html:
I think SpaceX might be able to reach approximately $1T revenue in 2030

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 14, 2026

parent.name: Elon Musk
parent.embed_html:
I think SpaceX might be able to reach approximately $1T revenue in 2030

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 14, 2026

ai_summary: Morgan Stanley projected SpaceX revenues ranging from $18.7B (2025) to $3.4T (2040), but Elon Musk publicly revised expectations upward, stating SpaceX could reach ~$1T revenue by 2030 and exceed $1T by 2031. This reveals significant confidence in SpaceX's growth trajectory and suggests either aggressive expansion plans (likely through Starlink commercialization and space-based services) that substantially outpace analyst consensus, providing operators insight into how rapidly space economy businesses can scale when competing assumptions are challenged.
embed_html:
And I would be surprised if revenue is not greater than $1T in 2031

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 14, 2026
